description: Restrict when tasks may be serviced by associating time windows with jobs and vehicles. Optimizer schedules service within valid windows, inserting waiting time where necessary.

actors.name: Customer
actors.description: Specifies acceptable delivery or pickup windows

actors.name: Optimization Engine
actors.description: Selects service start times that satisfy all windows

rules.window_inclusive: A time window [start, end] is satisfied when service begins at or after start and at or before end (both inclusive).
rules.early_arrival_wait: If a vehicle arrives before a window opens it waits; waiting time is included in route duration and reported per step.
rules.multi_window_selection: Multiple time windows per task are tried; the optimizer selects the window that minimises total route cost.
rules.vehicle_shift_window: A vehicle's time window defines its working hours; no step may be scheduled outside this window in standard solving mode.
rules.soft_constraints_plan_mode: In plan/ETA mode all time constraints become soft; violations are reported as lead_time (early) or delay (late) with duration.
rules.default_unconstrained: A default unconstrained time window (0, +inf) is applied when no window is specified.
rules.break_windows: Breaks carry time windows; break scheduling follows the same feasibility rules as job time windows.

values.description: No time window defined; any arrival time is valid
Vehicle en route; window not yet reached
Vehicle arrived before window opens; idling
Service start time falls within the window
Service time falls outside all windows (plan mode only)

transitions.description: Plan mode — service time outside all windows

given: service start time is between window_start and window_end (inclusive)
window_satisfied.result: Stop scheduled; waiting time recorded and added to route total.

given: vehicle arrives before the earliest time window start
early_arrival.result: Vehicle waits at stop until window opens; waiting time increases route duration.

given: task has multiple time windows defined
vehicle can reach the task before at least one window closes
multi_window_chosen.result: Optimizer picks the window minimising total route cost.

given: service time falls outside all defined time windows
window_violated_plan_mode.result: Violation recorded; cause is lead_time if early, delay if late.

given: vehicle cannot reach any task window without violating vehicle working hours
no_feasible_window.result: Job marked as unassigned; reported in solution unassigned list.

errors.message: No vehicle can serve this task within its time windows and working-hours constraints.
Time window is invalid: end time must be greater than or equal to start time.

events.name: stop.window.satisfied
events.description: Service scheduled within the task's time window

events.name: stop.window.waiting
events.description: Vehicle waiting at stop for window to open

events.name: stop.window.selected
events.description: One window chosen from multiple candidates for this task

events.name: stop.window.violated
events.description: Plan mode — service time outside all windows

events.name: stop.unassigned
events.description: Task could not be assigned due to infeasible windows
